channel.title: Mental
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Mental, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: An Unexpected Way To Ease Inflammation In The Gut & Support Digestion
item.description: Already take probiotics? Add this to your routine.

item.title: Indoor Air Quality Goes Beyond Just Using A Filter — Here's What To Know
item.description: Your HVAC might be trying to tell you something.

item.title: This Underrated Nutrient Was Just Linked To Depression In Women 30 & Under
item.description: And it's the first time it's been studied in humans.

item.title: Research Shows The Fascinating Link Between Hydration & Longevity
item.description: It's time to make that hydration habit stick.

item.title: What If Stress Isn’t The Enemy Of Youth, But A Secret Weapon?
item.description: This will change your perspective on stress
